## HPAI Epizootic situation in France : WILD BIRDS

## More than 300 wildlife cases as of the end of january 2026

## Cases in wildlife through the year

- -> Significant increase in incidence during fall 2025

<!-- image -->

The monthly evolution of HPAI cases in wild fauna since January 1, 2025 is shown as a bar chart. The x-axis measures the months of the year, starting with January and ending with December. The y-axis measures the number of cases, ranging from 0 to 150. The monthly evolution of HPAI cases in wild fauna has been relatively stable since January 2025, with a slight increase in cases in November and December.

## HPAI Epizootic situation in France : GENERAL MEASURES

##  Control measures in accordance to R UE 2020/687:

- Stamping out in outbreak
- Protection zone (PZ) and surveillance zone (SZ) with reinforced surveillance and movement restrictions.

<!-- image -->

## HPAI Epizootic situation in France : GENERAL MEASURES

## High national risk level since October 22 nd 2025

The HPAI risk level was raised to 'HIGH'. This decision entails the implementation of prevention and biosecurity measures:

-  For the entire territory:
- Sheltering for poultry of all species;
- Implementation of enhanced biosecurity measures during the transport of waterfowl;
- Specific conditions for the transport and use of decoys; Restrictions on the use of decoys depending on the category of owner;
- Conditions prior to the movement of game birds; Ban on gatherings of birds.

##  Areas at risk of spread (ZRD):

- Virological testing before moving palmipeds between two farms.

<!-- image -->

A map with a label "areas at risk of spread" and a point "zrd"

<!-- image -->

## HPAI Epizootic situation in France : POULTRY AND CAPTIVE BIRDS

<!-- image -->

## Poultry outbreaks :

- 58 outbreaks were confirmed in Vendée,  between October 2025 and the 20 th of Jannuary 2026.
- 32 of those outbreaks in Vendée occurred in duck farms.
- 5 outbreaks were confirmed in Maine et Loire in February 2026.

## Captive birds outbreaks :

- 1 outbreak confirmed in Vendée on October 15, 2025

## HPAI Epizootic situation in France : SPECIFIC TEMPORARY MEASURES

## Applied measures

## Established in 4 Departments (85, 44, 49 and 79) :

##  Surveillance :

- Virological test 48 hours before movement between 2 farms is mandatory for fattening palmipeds held in commercial establishments.
-  Vaccination of ducks
- Administration of a third dose of vaccine to all duck farms in the department 85 and in PZ/SZ and ZRD zones for departments 44, 49, and 79. The third dose is required for animals slaughtered beyond 77 days of age.

##  Biosecurity

- Obligation to remove animals in a single operation: for duck and turkey farms in PZ
- Strict sheltering of ducks
- Tarpaulin covers must be used on vehicles in PZ/SZ and ZRD zones.

Departements concerned by the reinforced measures

<!-- image -->

This image is a map of France.

-> The measures will be maintained at least until March 31.

<!-- image -->

## MINISTERE DE L'AGRICULTURE DE LAGRO-ALIMENTAIRE ET DE LA SOUVERAINETE ALIMENTAIRE

Liberte Egalite Fraternite
